languages.text: "Вивисектор сектора Бионики был в зоне поражения, когда произошел взрыв. Вероятно, атака была направлена на него".

traits.locale_text: "Да. Вивисектор сектора Бионики был в зоне поражения, когда произошел взрыв. Вероятно, атака была направлена на него".

languages.text: "The Vivisector from the Sector Bionica was in the blast zone when the explosion happened. The attack was probably aimed at him."
languages.original_text: "Вивисектор сектора Бионики был в зоне поражения, когда произошел взрыв. Вероятно, атака была направлена на него".

traits.locale_text: "The Vivisector from the Sector Bionica was in the blast zone when the explosion happened. The attack was probably aimed at him."

languages.text: "Sektör Biyonika'daki Dirikesimci, patlama gerçekleştiğinde alandaydı. Saldırının hedefinde muhtemelen o vard."
languages.original_text: "The Vivisector from the Sector Bionica was in the blast zone when the explosion happened. The attack was probably aimed at him."

traits.locale_text: "Sektör Biyonika'daki Dirikesimci, patlama gerçekleştiğinde alandaydı. Saldırının hedefinde muhtemelen o vard."

languages.text: “爆炸发生时，仿生区的解剖者就在爆炸的正中心。这次袭击很可能是冲着他来的。”
languages.original_text: "The Vivisector from the Sector Bionica was in the blast zone when the explosion happened. The attack was probably aimed at him."

traits.locale_text: “爆炸发生时，仿生区的解剖者就在爆炸的正中心。这次袭击很可能是冲着他来的。”

languages.text: "Der Vivisektor aus dem Sektor Bionica wurde von der Druckwelle der Explosion erfasst. Vermutlich galt der Anschlag ihm."
languages.original_text: "The Vivisector from the Sector Bionica was in the blast zone when the explosion happened. The attack was probably aimed at him."

traits.locale_text: "Der Vivisektor aus dem Sektor Bionica wurde von der Druckwelle der Explosion erfasst. Vermutlich galt der Anschlag ihm."

languages.text: «El vivisector del Sector Bionica estaba en el radio de la explosión. Es probable que el ataque estuviera dirigido a él».
languages.original_text: "The Vivisector from the Sector Bionica was in the blast zone when the explosion happened. The attack was probably aimed at him."

traits.locale_text: «El vivisector del Sector Bionica estaba en el radio de la explosión. Es probable que el ataque estuviera dirigido a él».

languages.text: « Le vivisecteur du secteur Bionica se trouvait dans la zone de l’explosion. Je pense que l'attaque le visait. »
languages.original_text: "The Vivisector from the Sector Bionica was in the blast zone when the explosion happened. The attack was probably aimed at him."

traits.locale_text: « Le vivisecteur du secteur Bionica se trouvait dans la zone de l’explosion. Je pense que l'attaque le visait. »

languages.text: "セクター・バイオニカのビビセクターは、爆発が起きたとき、爆心地にいた。攻撃はおそらく彼を狙ったものだろう"
languages.original_text: "The Vivisector from the Sector Bionica was in the blast zone when the explosion happened. The attack was probably aimed at him."
